label: PHAB Telegram Outbox
info:
PHAB outbound flow: pull outbox from NestJS -> send to Telegram -> ack/fail.

Env vars (Node-RED):
- PHAB_API_BASE (default: http://localhost:3000/api)
- TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
- TELEGRAM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN (optional)

name: Env vars
info:
Set in Node-RED settings/env:
PHAB_API_BASE=http://localhost:3000/api
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=<bot token>
TELEGRAM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN=<optional>

name: prepare pull request
extract commands
prepare Telegram call
check Telegram result
prepare ack request
prepare fail request
